use_case: Customer requests a refund within the 30-day standard window and the charge is eligible.
customer_reply: Thanks for reaching out. I've reviewed the charge on your account and I'm able to process a full refund of the most recent payment. You'll see it back on your card within 5 to 10 business days. Let me know if you have any other questions.
internal_note: Confirm exact amount in billing dashboard before sending. Apply tag refund-processed.

use_case: Customer requests a refund after the 30-day window and no exception applies.
customer_reply: Thanks for reaching out. After reviewing your account this charge falls outside our standard 30-day refund window so I'm not able to issue a cash refund here. I'd love to make this right with service credit or a one-month discount on your next billing cycle. Would either of those work for you?
internal_note: Default fallback when no SLA outage and no billing error. Do not promise cash refund. Apply tag refund-credit-offer.

use_case: Customer asks for a refund but has already filed a chargeback with their card issuer.
customer_reply: I can see your bank is currently reviewing a dispute on this charge. While that review is in progress we're not able to issue a separate refund on our side because the outcome is decided through the dispute process. Once the dispute is closed we can revisit if anything is still outstanding.
internal_note: Do not issue any refund. Route to Billing Disputes queue. Apply tag chargeback-in-progress. Never confirm or argue the dispute outcome.

use_case: Customer's invoice payment failed and they are asking what to do.
customer_reply: Thanks for the heads-up. The payment on invoice #INVOICE_ID didn't go through, which can happen when a card has expired, hit a daily limit, or been flagged by the issuing bank. The quickest path is to update the payment method in your billing settings and click Retry payment. If you'd like I can also resend the invoice link. No service interruption right now — you have a 7-day grace window before any account changes.
internal_note: Verify the invoice ID before sending. Do not lock the account before the grace window expires. Apply tag invoice-failed.

use_case: Customer on an Annual Enterprise contract asks for a refund.
customer_reply: Thanks for reaching out. Refunds on annual contracts are reviewed together with your Customer Success Manager so we can look at the full picture of your contract. I've looped in your CSM and they'll follow up within one business day to discuss options.
internal_note: Do not promise a refund. Annual Enterprise refunds require Finance Director plus assigned CSM approval. Apply tag enterprise and refund-pending-approval.
